main.question: 1. Which of the following enzymes is directly involved in the iodination of tyrosyl residues in thyroglobulin within the thyroid follicle lumen? a) Iodotyrosine deiodinase b) Thyroid peroxidase c) 5’-deiodinase type 2 d) Tyrosine hydroxylase

related.question: 1. Which of the following is a common symptom of acromegaly? a) Galactorrhea b) Hypotension c) Sleep apnea d) Alopecia e) Dry skin
